title: ACTOR_NOTIFICATION
description: Message sent by the Referee, addressed to the Actor, to notify that they have been named as Actor in an assessment request. Delivered to the Actor's Keeper (Ka), which holds it for the Actor (Message Delivery, RFC-0001 Section 6); the Ka endpoint is obtained from actor_keeper_endpoint in the ASSESSMENT_REQUEST or from a Norm-defined endpoint registry. Upon receiving this, the Actor is expected to respond with ACTOR_ACKNOWLEDGMENT and submit a FEE_DEPOSIT to the Keeper.

incident_id.description: Incident identifier assigned by the Claimant.

referee_id.description: Terminal ID of the Referee sending this notification.

claimant_id.description: Terminal ID of the Claimant who filed the assessment request.

incident_summary.description: Human-readable summary of the incident as provided by the Claimant.

incident_timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the incident occurred or was detected.

response_deadline.description: Deadline by which the Actor must respond with ACTOR_ACKNOWLEDGMENT. If no response is received by this time, the Referee treats the Actor as non-participating and proceeds accordingly.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when this message was sent.
